name: Bki Investment Company Limited
analysis: BKI has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 4% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$1.7800, stop A$1.7028, target A$2.0116 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
